revision.comment: track misuse to [[Category:Template:Succession box: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']] and [[Category:Template:Succession box: 'after' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{Main other |<!-- -->{{#if: {{{before|}}} | <!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:Template:Succession box: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:Template:Succession box: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:Template:Succession box: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:Template:Succession box: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:Template:Succession box: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{after|}}} | <!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:Template:Succession box: 'after' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[iI]ncumbent |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:Template:Succession box: 'after' parameter includes the word 'incumbent']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[aA]bolished |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:Template:Succession box: 'after' parameter includes the word 'abolished']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:Template:Succession box: 'after' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:Template:Succession box: 'after' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><noinclude><!-- -->{{Documentation}}<!-- --></noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Main other |<!-- -->{{#if: {{{before|}}} | <!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:Template:Succession box: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[cC]reated |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:Template:Succession box: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:Template:Succession box: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:Template:Succession box: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:Template:Succession box: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{after|}}} | <!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:Template:Succession box: 'after' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[iI]ncumbent |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|[[Category:Template:Succession box: 'after' parameter includes the word 'incumbent']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[aA]bolished |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:Template:Succession box: 'after' parameter includes the word 'abolished']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:Template:Succession box: 'after' parameter includes the word 'suspended']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| [[Category:Template:Succession box: 'after' parameter includes the word 'unknown']]<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><noinclude><!-- -->{{Documentation}}<!-- --></noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 11 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606946259|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{Main other |<!-- -->{{#if: {{{before|}}} | <!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=^%s*[nN][eE][wW] |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false -->|<!-- -->|<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{before|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| <!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#if: {{{after|}}} | <!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[vV]acant |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| <!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[iI]ncumbent |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->|<!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[aA]bolished |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| <!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[sS]uspended |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| <!-- -->}}<!-- -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{after|}}} |pattern=[uU]nknown |start=1 |match=1 |plain=false |nomatch=NOMATCH}} | NOMATCH<!-- -->|<!-- -->| <!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- --></includeonly><noinclude><!-- -->{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]<!-- --></noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Succession box: 'before' parameter begins with the word 'new']] [[Category:Succession box: 'before' parameter includes the word 'created']] [[Category:Succession box: 'before' parameter includes the word 'vacant']] [[Category:Succession box: 'before' parameter includes the word 'suspended']] [[Category:Succession box: 'before' parameter includes the word 'unknown']] [[Category:Succession box: 'after' parameter includes the word 'vacant']]
